arts.ttl: ‘I loved him at Crystal Palace’ – Nico Williams names Wilfried Zaha as inspiration
arts.sum: A technically gifted winger, there are some clear influences in Nico Williams’ (22) playing style. “Neymar, Cristiano Ronaldo – I have always liked these kinds of attackers,” the Athletic Bilbao forward told France…

arts.ttl: Athletic Club star suffers hamstring injury ahead of Mallorca matchup
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Athletic Club have this week been dealt a fresh setback on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Dani Vivian is set for an incoming spell…
